levels.L: He attacks himself more harshly than others, and you want to verify the authenticity of every compliment he says to you.
levels.M: The self-confidence value fluctuates with the weather. It can fly with the wind and shrink first against the wind.
levels.H: I have a general idea of ​​myself in my heart and am unlikely to be distracted by a passerby’s words.

levels.L: There are a lot of snowflakes in the inner channel, and they are often cached in a loop in "Who Am I".
levels.M: I can still recognize myself at ordinary times, but occasionally I am temporarily changed by my emotions.
levels.H: You have a clear understanding of your own temper, desires and bottom line.

levels.L: If you care more about comfort and safety, there is no need to rush into life every day.
levels.M: I want to make progress, but also want to relax for a while, and I often hold internal meetings on value ranking.
levels.H: It’s easy to be pushed forward by goals, growth, or some important belief.

levels.L: The alarm in love is so sensitive that even if you can’t read it back, you can still imagine the ending.
levels.M: Half trusting, half testing, there is always a tug of war in the heart.
levels.H: I prefer to believe in the relationship itself and not be scared away by the slightest disturbance.

levels.L: Emotional investment tends to be restrained. It’s not that the door to the heart is not open, but that the door is too tightly guarded.
levels.M: You will be committed, but you will give yourself a backup plan, so that you will not go all out.
levels.H: Once identified, it is easy to be serious and full of emotions and energy.

levels.L: It is easy to be clingy and easy to be clingy. The sense of warmth in a relationship is very important.
levels.M: It requires a little bit of intimacy and independence, and is an adjustable type of dependence.
levels.H: The sense of space is very important. No matter how much you love, you must leave a piece of land of your own.

levels.L: Look at the world with its own defensive filter. Be suspicious first, then get closer.
levels.M: Neither naive nor outright conspiracy theorist, it’s your instinct to wait and see.
levels.H: I am more willing to believe in human nature and goodwill, and not rush to sentence the world to death when trouble comes.

levels.L: The rules can be circumvented, and comfort and freedom often come first.
levels.M: Be defensive when you need to be defensive, and don’t be stubborn when you need to be flexible.
levels.H: I have a strong sense of order and I don’t like to improvise if I can follow the process.

A3.name: A3 Sense of meaning in life

levels.L: The sense of meaning is low, and it is easy to feel that many things are just going through the motions.
levels.M: Sometimes I have goals, sometimes I want to fail, and my outlook on life is half-activated.
levels.H: You have more direction in doing things and know roughly where you want to go.

levels.L: Think in advance and don't overturn. The avoidance system is activated before ambition.
levels.M: Sometimes I want to win, sometimes I just want to stay out of trouble, the motivations are mixed.
levels.H: More likely to be ignited by a sense of achievement, growth, and advancement.

levels.L: It’s easy to turn around a few times before making a decision, and mental meetings often times out.
levels.M: I will think about it, but I won’t think about it. It’s a normal hesitation.
levels.H: He is quick to make decisions and does not like to look back after making a decision.

levels.L: There is a deep relationship between execution and the dead line, and the later it gets, the more likely it is that it will wake up.
levels.M: It can be done, but the state depends on the timing, sometimes it is stable and sometimes it is unstable.
levels.H: The desire to push forward is relatively strong, and it feels like there is a thorn in my heart if things don't fall into place.

levels.L: Social networking is slow to start, and taking the initiative usually takes a while.
levels.M: If someone comes, you will be picked up, and if no one comes, you will not be forced to do so. Social flexibility is average.
levels.H: I am more willing to take the initiative to open up the scene, and I am not afraid of showing my face in the crowd.

levels.L: In a relationship, you want to be close and integrated, and when you get acquainted, it is easy to put people into the inner circle.
levels.M: I want to be close but also want to leave gaps. The sense of boundary depends on the object.
levels.H: She has a strong sense of boundaries and will instinctively take half a step back if she gets too close.

levels.L: The expression is more direct, and I basically don’t like to dwell on what’s on my mind.
levels.M: You can speak according to the atmosphere, and usually leave a little bit of each in truth and decency.
levels.H: Be more proficient in self-switching between different scenes, and the sense of reality will be distributed in layers.
